mdRecord.dcterms:title: 1981 Season: Arms and the Man by George Bernard Shaw
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Playbill for the 1981 Barter Theatre Season: Arms and the Man by George Bernard Shaw. Directed by Ada Brown Mather. Producing Director: Rex Partington. | Two by Five | Deathtrap | Oh, Coward! | Barter Players on Tour: The Heiress, March-April, 1982.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Theater
Virginia
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
